name: IBM Quantum: Optimize (SPSA)
description: Calls the quantum algorithm sidecar to run one stateless SPSA optimizer step (POST /optimize). Returns either updated circuit parameters for the next iteration or a convergence signal. Part of the IBM Quantum Algorithm Accelerator pattern — required for variational algorithms (QAOA, VQE).

properties.label: Optimize URL
properties.description: Full URL of the sidecar's /optimize endpoint. The default FEEL expression appends the path to the sidecarUrl process variable.

properties.label: Request Body (FEEL)
properties.description: FEEL object sent as the optimizer request body. current_params holds the variational parameters just evaluated; objective_value is the scalar cost from /process-results; optimizer_state is the opaque state blob returned by the previous call (set to {} on the first iteration).
properties.value: = {algorithm: "spsa", iteration: iteration, problem: problem, current_params: currentParams, objective_value: objectiveValue, optimizer_state: optimizerState}

properties.label: Result Variable
properties.description: Process variable to store the raw sidecar HTTP response

properties.label: Result Expression
properties.description: Maps the sidecar response to process variables. converged drives the gateway after this task. When not converged, currentParams and optimizerState are updated for the next iteration. When converged, optimalParams holds the best parameters found.
properties.value: = {converged: response.body.converged, iteration: response.body.iteration, optimizerState: if response.body.converged then {} else response.body.optimizer_state, currentParams: if response.body.converged then response.body.optimal_params else response.body.next_params, optimalParams: response.body.optimal_params, objectiveValue: if response.body.converged then response.body.objective_value else objectiveValue}

properties.label: Error Expression
properties.description: FEEL expression to map sidecar HTTP errors to BPMN errors
